title: bot: BotCommand::Send sends unpadded payload — interop broken with CLI receiver
description: bot/src/main.rs handle_command() BotCommand::Send serializes ClearMessage::Chat with serde_json::to_vec() but does NOT call pad(). The CLI receiver (commands.rs:1165) calls unpad() on every DELIVER payload; an unpadded payload fails unpad() and the message is silently dropped with 'DELIVER unpad failed' warning. Both ffi/src/api/client.rs encode_chat_payload() and wasm/src/client.rs build_payload() correctly call pad(). The bot self-test (run_self_test) also skips pad() but then reads back with from_slice() not unpad(), so it passes while masking the interop failure. Impact: messages sent from nie-bot are invisible to nie-cli recipients.
